# `CopyCharsetFromRom`

**Systems:** C64, PLUS4, C128  
**Parameters:** `a`

---

<div markdown="0" class="trse-help-body">

<h3>CopyCharsetFromRom( [address] );</h3>
<ul>
    <li>[address] - destination address to copy character set to</li>
</ul>


<h3>Description</h3>
<p>Copies the ROM charset to the desired memory location.</p>
